parameters.query: SELECT discord_id, name, clockify_user_id, role FROM pipemind.roster WHERE active = true AND role != 'client';

SELECT pm.roster_discord_id, cp.name AS project_name
FROM pipemind.project_memberships pm
JOIN pipemind.clockify_projects cp ON cp.clockify_project_id = pm.clockify_project_id
WHERE pm.is_active = true AND pm.roster_discord_id IS NOT NULL;

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model, max_tokens: $json.max_tokens, temperature: $json.temperature, system: $json.system, messages: $json.messages }) }}
